attribution_text: NGER state-level residual emission factors, Australian Clean Energy Regulator and DCCEEW, CC BY 4.0.

assumptions: DCCEEW does NOT officially publish a residual mix.  This factor is derived by netting LGC-surrendered MWh (assumed zero-emission per GHG Protocol Scope 2 market-based convention) from the published NGA grid-average factor.
LGC-surrendered share assumed = 0.240; formula: residual = grid_avg / (1 - lgc_share).
Gas speciation split uses NGA default shares (CO2 98.0%, CH4 1.5%, N2O 0.5%) unless overridden.
Apply to Scope 2 market-based reporting only when no supplier-specific contract (GreenPower, LGC) applies.
STC (small-scale) certificates are NOT netted: they are already excluded from the published NGA grid average.
explainability.audit_text: Derived Australian residual mix for NSW, FY 2023-24. Grid average 0.680 kgCO2e/kWh - LGC share 24.0% = residual 0.895 kgCO2e/kWh.
explainability.rationale: Derived Australian residual mix for NSW, FY 2023-24. Grid average 0.680 kgCO2e/kWh - LGC share 24.0% = residual 0.895 kgCO2e/kWh.
